name: 10 Days of Shrooms Kit
description_html:
Say hello to 10 Days of Shrooms, the ultimate countdown to feeling your best. 

Inside, you’ll find 21 Four Sigmatic favorites designed to support focus, calm, and gut health—plus exclusive merch you won’t find anywhere else. From energizing organic coffee to gut-soothing blends, each day is a step toward a better you!

Valued at over $420 and packed with priceless benefits, this box is more than a countdown—it’s your daily reminder to pause, sip, and elevate your routine.

name: Good Poops Bundle
description_html: Meet the Good Poops Bundle—your daily routine for better digestion, built around real coffee and functional support. From your morning cup to your nighttime wind-down, this stack combines gut-friendly ingredients with products you’ll actually want to use: smooth ground coffee, a functional blend, convenient elixir packets, soothing herbal tea, and a clean vanilla protein. Everything works together to support a healthier gut, without overcomplicating your routine.

name: Mystery Ground Coffee
description_html:
Sometimes the best cup is the one you didn’t plan.

Our Mystery Coffee Bag is your chance to score a full-size bag of premium ground coffee for just $8 (reg. $20).

You won’t know the exact roast or blend ahead of time—but you will get the same high-quality coffee we sell every day at full price. Fresh, flavorful, and ready to brew.

Perfect for the curious, the adventurous, or anyone who loves a great deal on great coffee.
